name: Saucy Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter an 8-inch x 8-inch x 2-inch baking dish.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt.
4. Stir in milk, butter, and vanilla until just blended.
5. Spoon the batter into the prepared dish and spread evenly.
6. In another bowl, combine brown sugar and remaining 2 tablespoons cocoa powder.
7. Gradually stir in boiling water until sugar dissolves. Pour over the batter in the pan.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top of the cake springs back when touched.
9. Cool for 30 minutes before dusting with confectioners' sugar and serving warm.
